logs.SYNC_STARTED: Synchronization with PMF open data started.
logs.SYNC_SUCCESS: Municipality data successfully extracted and persisted.
logs.RECORD_MAPPED: Public expenditure processed and normalized: ID {id}.
logs.ANOMALY_DETECTED: Anomaly detected in expenditure {id}: Value exceeds standard deviation.

errors.PROTOCOL_CONTRACT_VIOLATION: The government API contract was violated or changed.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS_FAULT: Access denied by the municipality transparency portal.
errors.MAPPING_TRANSFORMATION_FAULT: Error converting raw data to the institutional integrity standard.
